title: Summary: Turn 873
content: Project snapshot: KnowledgeBase (Maven, Java 8, Jackson/H2) with 42 Java files across Model, Service, Web layers, implementing a 3-step pipeline (MediaProcessing → KnowledgeBase → KnowledgeMap). Phase 1 complete: added `category` field to `Notion`, `notionCategoryPrompt` to `InferenceConfig`, and `NotionCategoryInferenceService` with LLM/noop implementations; Phase 2 pending: integrate category inference into pipeline, update services and HTTP server.
